programme.desc: President and Mrs. Obama want to honor America's 250th anniversary and celebrate the history of the nation on the occasion, but then Larry David calls.

programme.title: The Moment
programme.desc: As her arena tour debut looms, a pop star finds herself caught inside the afterglow of a breakout summer under the mounting pressure of what it costs to stay on top.

programme.title: Real Time With Bill Maher
programme.desc: Acerbic comic Bill Maher welcomes a panel of guests from diverse parts of the political spectrum for a lively discussion of current events, as well as offering his own perspective on contemporary issues.

programme.title: Life, Larry and the Pursuit of Unhappiness
programme.desc: President and Mrs. Obama want to honor America's 250th anniversary and celebrate the history of the nation on the occasion, but then Larry David calls.

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: The story of the Targaryen civil war with King Viserys I Targaryen's children battling for control of the Iron Throne.

programme.title: Greenland
programme.desc: John Garrity, his estranged wife and their young son embark on a perilous journey to find sanctuary as a planet-killing comet hurtles toward Earth. Amid terrifying accounts of cities getting leveled, the family experiences the best and worst in humanity. As the countdown to the global apocalypse approaches zero, their incredible trek culminates in a desperate, last-minute flight to a possible safe haven.

programme.title: Greenland 2: Migration
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a comet strike that decimated most of the planet, the Garrity family must leave the safety of their Greenland bunker to traverse a shattered world in search of a new home.

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: The story of the Targaryen civil war with King Viserys I Targaryen's children battling for control of the Iron Throne.

programme.title: Life, Larry and the Pursuit of Unhappiness
programme.desc: President and Mrs. Obama want to honor America's 250th anniversary and celebrate the history of the nation on the occasion, but then Larry David calls.

programme.title: The Witch
programme.desc: In 1630 New England, panic and despair envelops a farmer, his wife and their children when youngest son Samuel suddenly vanishes. The family blames Thomasin, the oldest daughter who was watching the boy at the time of his disappearance. With suspicion and paranoia mounting, twin siblings Mercy and Jonas suspect Thomasin of witchcraft, testing the clan's faith, loyalty and love to one another.

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: The story of the Targaryen civil war with King Viserys I Targaryen's children battling for control of the Iron Throne.

programme.title: Life, Larry and the Pursuit of Unhappiness
programme.desc: President and Mrs. Obama want to honor America's 250th anniversary and celebrate the history of the nation on the occasion, but then Larry David calls.

programme.title: How to Make a Killing
programme.desc: Disowned by his obscenely wealthy family, Becket Redfellow will stop at nothing to reclaim his inheritance, no matter how many relatives stand in his way.

programme.title: Christy
programme.desc: Christy Martin never imagined life beyond her small-town roots in West Virginia, until she discovered a knack for punching people. Fueled by grit, raw determination, and an unshakable desire to win, she charges into the world of boxing under the guidance of her trainer and manager-turned-husband, Jim. Flaunting a fiery persona in the ring, her toughest battles start to unfold outside it as she confronts family, identity, and a relationship that just might become life-or-death.

programme.title: The Smashing Machine
programme.desc: The true story of mixed martial arts and UFC fighter Mark Kerr, whose obsession with greatness made him a legend -- and nearly cost him everything.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat
programme.desc: Hunted by the fearsome warrior Sub-Zero, MMA fighter Cole Young finds sanctuary at the temple of Lord Raiden. Training with experienced fighters Liu Kang, Kung Lao and the rogue mercenary Kano, Cole prepares to stand with Earth's greatest champions to take on the enemies from Outworld in a high-stakes battle for the universe.

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: The story of the Targaryen civil war with King Viserys I Targaryen's children battling for control of the Iron Throne.

programme.title: Black Adam
programme.desc: In ancient Kahndaq, Teth Adam was bestowed the almighty powers of the gods. After using these powers for vengeance, he was imprisoned, becoming Black Adam. Nearly 5,000 years have passed, and Black Adam has gone from man to myth to legend. Now free, his unique form of justice, born out of rage, is challenged by modern-day heroes who form the Justice Society: Hawkman, Dr. Fate, Atom Smasher and Cyclone.

programme.title: From the World of John Wick: Ballerina
programme.desc: Trained in the assassin traditions of the Ruska Roma, Eve Macarro takes on an army of killers as she seeks revenge against those responsible for the death of her father.

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: The story of the Targaryen civil war with King Viserys I Targaryen's children battling for control of the Iron Throne.

programme.title: Men
programme.desc: Harper retreats to the countryside to be alone in the wake of a tragedy, but her unease at the town's leering and uncannily similar men grows into a fully fledged nightmare as her arrival awakens something primal in the forest.

programme.title: Sinners
programme.desc: Trying to leave their troubled lives behind, twin brothers return to their Mississippi hometown to start again, only to discover that an even greater evil is waiting to welcome them back.

programme.title: "Wuthering Heights"
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes when Heathcliff falls in love with Catherine Earnshaw, a woman from a wealthy family in 18th-century England.

programme.title: Weapons
programme.desc: When all but one child from the same classroom mysteriously vanish on the same night at exactly the same time, a community is left questioning who or what is behind their disappearance.

programme.title: Midsommar
programme.desc: A young American couple, their relationship foundering, travel to a Swedish midsummer festival where a seemingly pastoral paradise transforms into a sinister, dread-soaked nightmare as the locals reveal their terrifying agenda.

programme.title: Pillion
programme.desc: A timid man is swept off his feet when an enigmatic, impossibly handsome biker takes him on as his submissive.

programme.title: The Welcome Table
programme.desc: Investigation into the impact of the ecological disaster on everyday people's lives by looking at the intersection of climate and immigration.

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: The story of the Targaryen civil war with King Viserys I Targaryen's children battling for control of the Iron Throne.

programme.title: The Greatest Showman
programme.desc: Growing up in the early 1800s, P.T. Barnum displays a natural talent for publicity and promotion, selling lottery tickets by age 12. After trying his hands at various jobs, P.T. turns to show business to indulge his limitless imagination, rising from nothing to create the Barnum & Bailey circus. Featuring catchy musical numbers, exotic performers and daring acrobatic feats, Barnum's mesmerizing spectacle soon takes the world by storm to become the greatest show on Earth.

programme.title: The Substance
programme.desc: Fading actress Elisabeth Sparkle becomes distressed when her chauvinistic boss fires her from her aerobics show. She soon injects herself with a mysterious serum that promises a younger, better version of herself, but things go horribly wrong.

programme.title: This Is Spinal Tap
programme.desc: "This Is Spinal Tap" shines a light on the self-contained universe of a metal band struggling to get back on the charts, including everything from its complicated history of ups and downs, gold albums, name changes and undersold concert dates, along with the full host of requisite groupies, promoters, hangers-on and historians, sessions, release events and those special behind-the-scenes moments that keep it all real.

programme.title: Spinal Tap II: The End Continues
programme.desc: Documentarian Marty DiBergi follows estranged Spinal Tap bandmates David St. Hubbins, Nigel Tufnel and Derek Smalls as they search for a drummer and prepare for a reunion concert in New Orleans. Joined by music royalty Paul McCartney and Elton John, Spinal Tap wrestles with their checkered past to put on a show they hope will solidify their place in the pantheon of rock 'n' roll.

programme.title: Christy
programme.desc: Christy Martin never imagined life beyond her small-town roots in West Virginia, until she discovered a knack for punching people. Fueled by grit, raw determination, and an unshakable desire to win, she charges into the world of boxing under the guidance of her trainer and manager-turned-husband, Jim. Flaunting a fiery persona in the ring, her toughest battles start to unfold outside it as she confronts family, identity, and a relationship that just might become life-or-death.

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: The story of the Targaryen civil war with King Viserys I Targaryen's children battling for control of the Iron Throne.

programme.title: Earth, Wind & Fire (To Be Celestial vs. That's the Weight of the World)
programme.desc: Directed by Ahmir Questlove Thompson, exploring the musical origins and lasting cultural impact of Earth, Wind and Fire.

programme.title: Ready Player One
programme.desc: In 2045, the creator of a virtual reality universe promises his fortune to the first person to discover a digital Easter egg. Soon, young Wade Watts finds himself in a reality-bending treasure hunt through the mysterious and fantastical world.

programme.title: Battle of the Sexes
programme.desc: The 1973 tennis match between Billie Jean King and Bobby Riggs became the most watched televised sports event of all time. Trapped in the media glare, King and Riggs were on opposites sides of a binary argument, but off-court each was fighting more personal and complex battles. With her husband urging her to fight for equal pay, the private King was also struggling to come to terms with her own sexuality, while Riggs gambled his legacy and reputation in a bid to relive the glories of his past.

programme.title: Dust Bunny
programme.desc: Ten-year-old Aurora asks a hit man to kill the monster she believes ate her entire family. To protect her, he'll need to battle an onslaught of assassins while accepting the fact that some monsters are real.

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: The story of the Targaryen civil war with King Viserys I Targaryen's children battling for control of the Iron Throne.

programme.title: The Welcome Table
programme.desc: Investigation into the impact of the ecological disaster on everyday people's lives by looking at the intersection of climate and immigration.

programme.title: Moonlight
programme.desc: A look at three defining chapters in the life of Chiron, a young black man growing up in Miami. His epic journey to manhood is guided by the kindness, support and love of the community that helps raise him.

programme.title: The Shape of Water
programme.desc: Elisa is a mute, isolated woman who works in a hidden, high-security government laboratory. Her life changes forever when she discovers the lab's classified secret -- a mysterious, scaled creature from South America that lives in a water tank.

programme.title: Life, Larry and the Pursuit of Unhappiness
programme.desc: President and Mrs. Obama want to honor America's 250th anniversary and celebrate the history of the nation on the occasion, but then Larry David calls.

programme.title: Eddington
programme.desc: A standoff between a small-town sheriff and mayor sparks a powder keg as neighbor is pitted against neighbor in May 2020 in Eddington, N.M.

programme.title: The Welcome Table
programme.desc: Investigation into the impact of the ecological disaster on everyday people's lives by looking at the intersection of climate and immigration.

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: The story of the Targaryen civil war with King Viserys I Targaryen's children battling for control of the Iron Throne.

programme.title: Twilight
programme.desc: High-school student Bella Swan, always a bit of a misfit, doesn't expect life to change much when she moves from sunny Arizona to rainy Washington state. Then she meets Edward Cullen, a handsome but mysterious teen whose eyes seem to peer directly into her soul. Edward is a vampire whose family does not drink blood, and Bella, far from being frightened, enters into a dangerous romance with her immortal soulmate.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: New Moon
programme.desc: After the abrupt departure of Edward, her vampire love, Bella finds comfort in her deepening friendship with Jacob Black. However, Bella's loyalties are put to the test as she becomes drawn into the world of werewolves, ancient enemies of vampires.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Eclipse
programme.desc: Danger once again surrounds Bella, as a string of mysterious killings terrorizes Seattle and a malicious vampire continues her infernal quest for revenge. Amid the tumult, Bella must choose between her love for Edward and her friendship with Jacob, knowing that her decision may ignite the long-simmering feud between vampire and werewolf.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 1
programme.desc: At last, Bella and Edward are getting married. When Jacob finds out that Bella wants to spend her honeymoon as a human, he is horrified, for Edward's passion could accidentally kill her. Bella does indeed survive her honeymoon, but a new complication arises when she discovers that she's pregnant, and the child is growing at an alarming rate. The pregnancy sets the wolves against Bella and Edward, but Jacob vows to protect his friend.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 2
programme.desc: Bella awakes, as a vampire, from her life-threatening labor, and her newborn daughter, Renesmee, proves to be very special indeed. While Bella adjusts to her new state of being, Renesmee experiences accelerated growth. When the Volturi learn of the baby's existence, they declare her to be an abomination and sentence the Cullens to death. Bella, Edward and the rest of the clan seek help from allies around the world to protect their family.

programme.title: Freaky Tales
programme.desc: An NBA star, a corrupt cop, a female rap duo, teenage punks, neo-Nazis and a debt collector embark on a collision course in 1987 Oakland, Calif.

programme.title: This Is Spinal Tap
programme.desc: "This Is Spinal Tap" shines a light on the self-contained universe of a metal band struggling to get back on the charts, including everything from its complicated history of ups and downs, gold albums, name changes and undersold concert dates, along with the full host of requisite groupies, promoters, hangers-on and historians, sessions, release events and those special behind-the-scenes moments that keep it all real.

programme.title: Spinal Tap II: The End Continues
programme.desc: Documentarian Marty DiBergi follows estranged Spinal Tap bandmates David St. Hubbins, Nigel Tufnel and Derek Smalls as they search for a drummer and prepare for a reunion concert in New Orleans. Joined by music royalty Paul McCartney and Elton John, Spinal Tap wrestles with their checkered past to put on a show they hope will solidify their place in the pantheon of rock 'n' roll.

programme.title: Dead of Winter
programme.desc: A grief-stricken widow stops by a remote cabin after getting lost on the back roads of Minnesota in the middle of winter. She soon finds herself in a desperate fight for survival as she encounters a murderous couple holding a young woman hostage.

programme.title: Death of a Unicorn
programme.desc: A weekend retreat has deadly consequences when a father and daughter accidentally hit and kill a unicorn while en route to find his billionaire boss, who seeks to exploit the creature's miraculous curative properties.

programme.title: Martin Lawrence: You So Crazy
programme.desc: Filmed at a sold-out Majestic Theater in Brooklyn, N.Y., comedian Martin Lawrence delivers his first full-length stand-up special. Harking back to Eddie Murphy, the leather-clad comic riffs on drugs, jail, his impoverished upbringing with his mother and his luck -- or lack thereof -- with women. He also speaks at length about racism and the Rodney King ruling and subsequent riots. Lawrence even offers his unique perspective on how to maintain a successful relationship.

programme.title: Frankenstein 1970
programme.desc: The baron's grandson (Boris Karloff) rents the family castle to a TV crew to fund his atomic revival of the family monster.

programme.title: Wuthering Heights
programme.desc: In this adaptation of the classic Emily Brontë novel set in 19th-century England, wealthy young Cathy Earnshaw (Merle Oberon) shares a loving bond with Heathcliff (Laurence Olivier), a poor childhood friend who now works in her stables. Unfortunately, things become complicated when the affluent Edgar Linton (David Niven) decides to pursue Cathy, and Heathcliff leaves out of resentment. Though Heathcliff returns with a self-made fortune, he realizes he may have lost Cathy in his absence.

programme.title: All the Beauty and the Bloodshed
programme.desc: From Academy Award winner Laura Poitras comes an epic, emotional and interconnected story about internationally renowned artist and activist Nan Goldin told through her slideshows, intimate interviews, ground-breaking photography, and rare footage of her personal fight to hold the Sackler family accountable for the opioid crisis. The film interweaves Goldin's past and present, the deeply personal and urgently political, from P.A.I.N.'s (Prescription Addiction Intervention Now) actions.

programme.title: After Truth: Disinformation and the Cost of Fake News
programme.desc: Filmmaker Andrew Rossi examines the rising phenomenon of fake news and how it impacts the average citizen in the United States.

programme.title: Joker
programme.desc: Forever alone in a crowd, failed comedian Arthur Fleck seeks connection as he walks the streets of Gotham City. Arthur wears two masks -- the one he paints for his day job as a clown, and the guise he projects in a futile attempt to feel like he's part of the world around him. Isolated, bullied and disregarded by society, Fleck begins a slow descent into madness as he transforms into the criminal mastermind known as the Joker.

programme.title: Joker: Folie à Deux
programme.desc: Struggling with his dual identity, failed comedian Arthur Fleck stumbles upon true love while incarcerated at Arkham State Hospital. Awaiting trial for the murder of five people, Fleck soon discovers the music that's always been inside him.

programme.title: The Conjuring
programme.desc: In 1970, paranormal investigators and demonologists Lorraine (Vera Farmiga) and Ed (Patrick Wilson) Warren are summoned to the home of Carolyn (Lili Taylor) and Roger (Ron Livingston) Perron. The Perrons and their five daughters have recently moved into a secluded farmhouse, where a supernatural presence has made itself known. Though the manifestations are relatively benign at first, events soon escalate in horrifying fashion, especially after the Warrens discover the house's macabre history.

programme.title: The Conjuring 2
programme.desc: In 1977, paranormal investigators Ed (Patrick Wilson) and Lorraine Warren come out of a self-imposed sabbatical to travel to Enfield, a borough in north London. There, they meet Peggy Hodgson, an overwhelmed single mother of four who tells the couple that something evil is in her home. Ed and Lorraine believe her story when the youngest daughter starts to show signs of demonic possession. As the Warrens try to help the besieged girl, they become the next targets of the malicious spirit.

programme.title: The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It
programme.desc: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren take on one of the most sensational cases of their careers after a cop stumbles upon a dazed and bloodied young man walking down the road. Accused of murder, the suspect claims demonic possession as his defense, forcing the Warrens into a supernatural inquiry unlike anything they've ever seen before.

programme.title: The Conjuring: Last Rites
programme.desc: In 1986 paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren travel to Pennsylvania to vanquish a demon from a family's home.

programme.title: Spring Breakers
programme.desc: College students Candy (Vanessa Hudgens), Faith (Selena Gomez), Brit (Ashley Benson) and Cotty (Rachel Korine) are short of the cash they need for a spring-break trip, so they rob a diner and head down to Florida. However, the police soon break up the party and arrest them. The curvaceous quartet are unexpectedly bailed out by a drug dealer and aspiring rap artist named Alien (James Franco). Soon after, three of the four gal pals decide to join Alien in a life of crime.

programme.title: Lurker
programme.desc: A retail employee infiltrates the inner circle of an artist on the verge of stardom. As he gets closer to the budding music star, access and proximity become a matter of life and death.

programme.title: A Complete Unknown
programme.desc: In the early 1960s, 19-year-old Bob Dylan arrives in New York with his guitar and revolutionary talent, destined to change the course of American music. Forming his most intimate relationships during his rise to fame, he grows restless with the folk movement, making a controversial choice that reverberates worldwide.

programme.title: Bring Me the Beauties
programme.desc: After meeting Frederick von Mierers, a guru who preaches New Age spirituality, the young Hoyt Richards adopts and spreads his teachings.

programme.title: Bring Me the Beauties
programme.desc: As Frederick prepares for a coming global cataclysm, model Jacki Adams joins Eternal Values and exposes the group's true nature.

programme.title: Bring Me the Beauties
programme.desc: The group splinters and eventually dwindles in North Carolina; as 1999 approaches, Hoyt grows skeptical and escapes to California where he grapples with the shame and regret of recruiting others while hurting his own family, as he reconnects and reflects on his experiences with former members.

programme.title: Dune
programme.desc: Paul Atreides, a brilliant and gifted young man born into a great destiny beyond his understanding, must travel to a dangerous planet in the universe to ensure the future of his family and his people. As malevolent forces explode into conflict over the planet's exclusive supply of a precious resource in existence, only those who can conquer their own fear will survive.

programme.title: Dune: Part Two
programme.desc: Paul Atreides unites with Chani and the Fremen while seeking revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the universe, he must prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

programme.title: John Wick
programme.desc: Legendary assassin John Wick (Keanu Reeves) retired from his violent career after marrying the love of his life. Her sudden death leaves John in deep mourning. When sadistic mobster Iosef Tarasov (Alfie Allen) and his thugs steal John's prized car and kill the puppy that was a last gift from his wife, John unleashes the remorseless killing machine within and seeks vengeance. Meanwhile, Iosef's father (Michael Nyqvist) -- John's former colleague -- puts a huge bounty on John's head.

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 2
programme.desc: Retired super-assassin John Wick's plans to resume a quiet civilian life are cut short when Italian gangster Santino D'Antonio shows up on his doorstep with a gold marker, compelling him to repay past favors. Ordered by Winston, kingpin of secret assassin society The Continental, to respect the organization's ancient code, Wick reluctantly accepts the assignment to travel to Rome to take out D'Antonio's sister, the ruthless capo atop the Italian Camorra crime syndicate.

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 3 -- Parabellum
programme.desc: After gunning down a member of the High Table -- the shadowy international assassin's guild -- legendary hit man John Wick finds himself stripped of the organization's protective services. Now stuck with a $14 million bounty on his head, Wick must fight his way through the streets of New York as he becomes the target of the world's most ruthless killers.

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 4
programme.desc: With the price on his head ever-increasing, legendary hit man John Wick takes his fight against the High Table global as he seeks out the most powerful players in the underworld, from New York to Paris to Japan to Berlin.

programme.title: From the World of John Wick: Ballerina
programme.desc: Trained in the assassin traditions of the Ruska Roma, Eve Macarro takes on an army of killers as she seeks revenge against those responsible for the death of her father.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: Nick Morton is a soldier of fortune who plunders ancient sites for timeless artifacts and sells them to the highest bidder. When Nick and his partner come under attack in the Middle East, the ensuing battle accidentally unearths Ahmanet, a betrayed Egyptian princess who was entombed under the desert for thousands of years. With her powers constantly evolving, Morton must now stop the resurrected monster as she embarks on a furious rampage through the streets of London.

programme.title: Sorry, Baby
programme.desc: Something terrible happened to Agnes. But life goes on for everyone else. When a friend visits on the brink of an important milestone, Agnes realizes how stuck she's been, in this bittersweet story of finding your way after your world comes crashing down.

programme.title: Norm of the North
programme.desc: Norm (Rob Schneider) the polar bear doesn't know how to hunt, but he does possess the unique ability to talk to humans. When the wealthy Mr. Greene (Ken Jeong) unveils his idea to build luxury condos in the Arctic, Norm realizes that his beloved home is in jeopardy. Accompanied by three mischievous lemmings, Norm stows away on a ship to New York. Once there, he meets a surprising ally (Maya Kay) who helps him hatch a scheme to sabotage the shady developer's plans.

programme.title: Nine Lives
programme.desc: Tom Brand is a billionaire whose workaholic lifestyle takes him away from his loving wife Lara and adorable daughter Rebecca. Needing a present for Rebecca's 11th birthday, Brand buys a seemingly harmless cat from a mysterious pet store. Suddenly, a bizarre turn of events traps poor Tom inside the animal's body. The owner of the business tells him that he has one week to reconnect with his family, or live out the rest of his days as a cute and furry feline named Mr. Fuzzypants.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep Movie
programme.desc: All is well at Mossy Bottom Farm, except for the fact that the animals will do anything to get out of work. So, Shaun the sheep and his scheming friends devise a plan to put their master to sleep. However, the ruse backfires when the poor farmer finds himself transported to the big city, having lost his memory. Now, it's up to Sean, Timmy the lamb, Shirley the ewe and the rest of the gang to travel to the metropolis and get him back, while not landing in even more trouble themselves.

programme.title: The LEGO NINJAGO Movie
programme.desc: The battle for NINJAGO City calls to action young Master Builder Lloyd, aka the Green Ninja, along with his friends, also secret ninja warriors. Led by Master Wu, as wise-cracking as he is wise, they must defeat the evil warlord Garmadon, who also happens to be Lloyd's dad. Pitting father against son, the epic showdown tests these fierce but undisciplined modern-day ninjas as they learn to check their egos and pull together to unleash the inner power of Spinjitzu.

programme.title: Charlie Hustle & the Matter of Pete Rose
programme.desc: At the age of 81, more than three decades after receiving a lifetime ban for gambling, former Cincinnati Reds star Pete Rose reignites his quest for reinstatement into Major League Baseball while recounting his unlikely rise to the top of the sport.

programme.title: Charlie Hustle & the Matter of Pete Rose
programme.desc: Nicknamed "Charlie Hustle" for dirty work ethic, Pete Rose becomes the face of baseball; Rose helps transform the Cincinnati Reds into the "Big Red Machine," winning back-to-back World Series titles in the '70s.

programme.title: Charlie Hustle & the Matter of Pete Rose
programme.desc: Pete Rose becomes the highest paid player in baseball; in 1985 he breaks Ty Cobb's record to become MLB's all-time career hits leader; but a gambling scandal leads to a prison sentence and lifetime banishment from the game he loves.

programme.title: Charlie Hustle & the Matter of Pete Rose
programme.desc: After years of denial, in 2004, Pete Rose publicly admits that he bet on the game of baseball; Rose confronts the truth about his public image and makes one last bid for MLB reinstatement and enshrinement in the National Baseball Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Gran Turismo
programme.desc: The true story of a team of unlikely underdogs -- a working-class gamer, a former race car driver, and an idealistic motorsport executive -- who risk it all to take on the most elite sport in the world.

programme.title: Bride of Frankenstein
programme.desc: After recovering from injuries sustained in the mob attack upon himself and his creation, Dr. Frankenstein (Colin Clive) falls under the control of his former mentor, Dr. Pretorius (Ernest Thesiger), who insists the now-chastened doctor resume his experiments in creating new life. Meanwhile, the Monster (Boris Karloff) remains on the run from those who wish to destroy him without understanding that his intentions are generally good despite his lack of socialization and self-control.

programme.title: Mary Shelley's Frankenstein
programme.desc: As Viktor Frankenstein (Kenneth Branagh) is dying he shares a tale of gruesome terror with a sea captain. Viktor, using previous experiments by a brilliant scientist, was able to bring a creature (Robert De Niro) assembled from body parts back to life. Once he realized how destructive his experiments had become, he abandoned the creature and tried to live a normal life with his fiance (Helena Bonham Carter). The lonely creature seeks out Viktor and demands one of two things: a bride or revenge.

programme.title: Weeds
programme.desc: Andy, Nancy's brother in-law, causes major problems with his surprise visit. Celia reveals she has cancer.

programme.title: Nurse Jackie
programme.desc: As Jackie's supply of pills starts to dwindle, her strategies become more intense and secretive.

programme.title: Nurse Jackie
programme.desc: Jackie soothes Grace's anxiety about the saint pageant. Kelly Slater continues to win over the All Saints crew

programme.title: Nurse Jackie
programme.desc: Jackie visits Bill at his diner only to find that he has no pills for her.

programme.title: Nurse Jackie
programme.desc: With Jackie's drug hookup crushed under a truck, she's run out of pills and is jonesing.

programme.title: Nurse Jackie
programme.desc: The Peytons meet with Grace's psychiatrist. When Jackie asks Eddie if he can fill Grace's scrip, he's cagey.

programme.title: Grace and Frankie
programme.desc: Grace's insecurities flare at a lavish fundraiser, where Frankie gets swept up in a silent auction.

programme.title: Grace and Frankie
programme.desc: Robert and Sol grapple with a health scare, while Grace's bad knee sparks a new business idea.

programme.title: Grace and Frankie
programme.desc: Grace worries that Nick isn't satisfied with their sex life. Sol decides to keep his diagnosis a secret.

programme.title: Grace and Frankie
programme.desc: Robert's fussing irritates Sol. Barry presses Brianna and Mallory to make up.

programme.title: Grace and Frankie
programme.desc: Grace wants to leverage Jack's celebrity connections ... and Sol and Robert realize they've met him before.

programme.title: Weeds
programme.desc: It's Part 2 of the WEEDS series finale. The Botwins (and Doug!) are at a crossroads. How will it all end?

programme.title: Weeds
programme.desc: While starting a pot business to support her family, Nancy tries to make sure her sons go down the right path.

programme.title: Weeds
programme.desc: Nancy and her children suffer from a lack of funds in the household. Celia confronts her husband's mistress.

programme.title: Weeds

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The iconic TV series is back, but in a brand-new setting with brand-new prize boxes and a new batch of contestants hoping to win a whopping cash prize - who will have what it takes to beat our brand-new Banker? Now hosted by Stephen Mulhern, the series will see contestants battle it out against the notorious Banker to be in with a chance of winning a life-changing cash prize in a nail-biting game of nerves and intuition. Contestants are confronted with 22 sealed boxes with each one hiding a different amount of money - without knowing what each one contains, the contestant must eliminate the boxes, which are opened one at a time, and the amount of money inside is revealed. Pressure mounts as the player is tempted by the notorious Banker to accept an offer of cash in exchange for what might be inside their box, and as long as the larger cash prizes remain unchosen, the Banker's offers will get higher... but that can all change in an instant if a big cash prize is unveiled.

programme.desc: Three single guys are hoping to impress model April Magic - she won't know who is shopping for clothes for her and will have to choose her date based entirely on the outfits they pick. programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Suzanne Morton is brought into a hospital Accident and Emergency department with flu-like symptoms - and leaves in a body bag. Detectives Ronnie Brooks and Matt Devlin treat her case as suspicious as they investigate the department, which has had three similar deaths within six months. The ward was extremely busy the night Suzanne died, which makes their job tougher - can they find the killer before another victim is targeted? When the case comes to court, senior crown prosecutor Jacob Thorne is pulled in opposite directions as the chief suspect claims to have been framed for murder by others in his department. With a conspiracy of silence spreading through the hospital staff, it becomes clear that there is more to the case than meets the eye. In order to find the truth, the team must penetrate the hospital staff's web of professional loyalties.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: This episode, Safe, sees the team investigate the reported kidnapping of a small child. When two-year-old Ryan Stark goes missing from a high street merry-go-round, his distraught mother Kayla reports him kidnapped and a massive police hunt is launched to find the missing toddler. In spite of public appeals and additional manpower, the search seems to throw up more questions than answers. With the investigation seemingly going nowhere, the team have to dig deeper - and they discover that the child had a history with social services before he went missing. Armed with this new information, the team wonder whether Kayla is not being entirely truthful. But with more than one suspect and a complete lack of physical evidence, can they ever get to the bottom of what happened to baby Ryan?

programme.desc: Detective drama series. programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: The gripping crime drama continues with an episode in which there may be more to a seemingly cut-and-dried case than meets the eye. When call girl Katka Cizek is found dead in a pool of blood in an upmarket apartment, only one of her admirers seems to fit the bill for the culprit. He was with her on the night of her death, he does not have an alibi and he has everything to lose if his secret obsession with her were to be revealed. The evidence against him seems clear, and when the matter comes to trial, crown prosecutor Alesha Phillips is given the reins to lead the cross-examination. But as she looks further into the case, Alesha begins to suspect that someone has reason to frame the accused. As she digs deeper, determined to find the truth, she uncovers a shattering betrayal which proves that there are no winners in this case.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: The police are called to investigate a horrifying gun attack which has left a nightclub peppered with bullets and two victims bleeding out on the floor. But the shocks do not end there, as the shooters begin a deadly rampage through the streets of London. With the media swarming over the case and a hostage in danger, Ronnie Brooks and Matt Devlin find themselves up against the clock as they desperately hunt down the Bonnie-and-Clyde duo responsible for the bloody massacre. When the violent pair are brought to trial, defence barrister Phyllis Gladstone claims that one of the two suspects was more innocent victim than vicious killer. Was the defendant acting out of fear after being beaten and bullied into submission by her partner-in-crime? Aware that there are two sides to every story, the team are under pressure to ensure that someone is held responsible for a murderous spree which has claimed five lives.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Feature-length drama. The owner of Easterly Grange Hotel has died as an annual festival begins in the hotel's gardens - Barnaby attends the funeral and learns that the manager of the hotel is missing. The reading of the will reveals that the hotel has been divided among the missing manager, his glamorous wife, the hotel chef and the hotel accountant - after a dog appears with the severed hand of the missing manager, Barnaby begins some serious enquiries. Threatening notes are soon delivered to each of those named in the will - and accidents befall them one by one. One is poisoned by mushrooms, another accidentally shot, another crushed by a falling drinks cabinet and two nearly killed when their van's are sabotaged - Barnaby discovers that there had been a new will entrusted to the hotel manager but that it disappeared when he disappeared. Could that explain why the will's beneficiaries have all suffered fatal accidents... and who the destroying angel that has arranged the deaths is?

programme.desc: US documentary series set in the world of salvage. Mike Wolfe and Frank Fritz visit a theme park during a clear-out and later discover some shocking news about a collection of circus posters.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Ray Veilleux spins out into oncoming big rigs, Jack Jessee battles a 200-ton monster haul to Prudhoe, Alex Debogorski risks a bust by the DOT, and Lisa Kelly races to raise cash to buy back her horse.

programme.title: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson returns to the host's chair as six contestants vie for a place in the famous hot seat and try to walk away with one million pounds.

programme.title: The Motorbike Show
programme.desc: Henry Cole returns as he rides a rare and desirable bike - the Brough Superior - goes behind the scenes at a British Superbike race to check out the legendary Chris 'The Stalker' Walker and gets his hands dirty reuniting with bike restorer Pete Thorne as he works on a 1981 Yamaha XT500 trail bike as we also hear how Norton are making a return to TT.

programme.title: Berlin Station
programme.desc: April faces the loss of the tech when her assets are arrested and face deportation. Kirsch's spy swap goes horribly awry when Bruno is exchanged instead of Daniel.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The return of the American version of Gordon Ramsay's culinary boot camp. For the first time in the show's history, the action is taking place on the East Coast at the Foxwoods Resort Casino - the theme of the 23rd series is Head Chefs Only with 18 talented head chefs coming from all ages, backgrounds, culinary specialties and restaurant types. The chefs are used to calling the shots, but Gordon is setting the bar higher than ever before with such proven leaders in the kitchen - in this episode, the 18 contestants set out to impress Chef Ramsay in the Signature Dish Challenge before embarking on their first dinner service.

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: Adventure series about a European crime-fighting team. A young woman and her father call on the Protectors in Denmark to deliver a huge ransom to be handed over for stolen jewellery.

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: Adventure series about a European crime-fighting team. An English boy is framed and arrested in Spain after a drug dealer plants marijuana in his backpack.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: American sitcom about a well-off bachelor whose life is disrupted when his brother and young nephew move in with him. Alan avoids taking his 22-year-old girlfriend to Jake's birthday when he is worried about what Evelyn will make of her.

programme.title: The Protectors

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Thomas discovers that an elderly woman claiming to be Robin Masters' high school teacher actually works for the KGB and is on a mission to assassinate a former freedom fighter in Hawaii.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Drama series about a suave troubleshooter. Sinister agents kidnap the sister of an ex-RAF pilot with the aim of forcing him into stealing a top-secret jet - when the pilot carries out the deed and flees justice in the guise of a nun while hotly pursued by The Saint, Simon Templar finds himself having to take a crash course in the finer points of flying a stolen experimental plane.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Classic drama starring Michael Elphick. When Harry hosts an Austria-themed night at the Woodcote, he discovers that it is being used as a cover by a gang of criminals on the trail of hidden plans and enlists Ken's help.

programme.title: The Champions
programme.desc: Fantasy espionage series. Nemesis sends its superagents to investigate why a country is breaking an international treaty by testing nuclear weapons under Antarctica.

programme.title: Battlebots
programme.desc: US robot combat series. After four qualifying fights and four gruelling elimination battles, two teams must face each other in the toughest task in robot combat: the World Championship VII Final at the packed BattleBots Arena in Las Vegas - however, they must first triumph in the semi-finals. With many of the top seeds eliminated in a series of shocking upsets, there may be more surprises in store as one team hoists the Giant Nut and is forever honoured in the BattleBots Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. The president of a family-run business hires Thomas to investigate whether his nephew is secretly siphoning off company funds to line his own pockets.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Higgins begins researching the gruesome history of Second World War internment camps, unwittingly making himself the target of a murder plot devised to prevent a 40-year-old secret from being revealed.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Donald Sutherland guest stars as suave freelance troubleshooter Simon Templar embarks on another adventure involving action and intrigue. The Saint is sent to jail, but his sentence is part of a police plan to smash a large-scale prison escape organisation run by callous killers.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Classic drama starring Michael Elphick. Ken finds he has taken on more than he bargained for when he is hired to help a man leave town, and Harry might be sitting on an ecological time bomb.

programme.title: The Champions
programme.desc: Fantasy espionage series. The Champions investigate the murder of three students in the Austrian Alps.

After travelling to over 20 dramatic locations in search of monster fish, biologist and extreme angler Jeremy Wade encounters a most dangerous challenge when stories of attacks in a remote corner of Ukraine take him on a hunt for an elusive lake monster and then to the most unlikely and extraordinary location of his career - Chernobyl's reactor number 4, the site of the worst nuclear accident in history. In a nerve-shredding race against radiation and time, can Jeremy reveal the culprit and deliver it to scientists who are searching for evidence of mutant species?
